page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, providing 16 vCPUs without hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, which translates to 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server includes a single NVIDIA P4 GPU equipped with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not feature any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers dedicated CPU resources and hardware acceleration via a single GPU, balancing compute power with entry-level graphics processing. The lack of local storage and hyperthreading represents a tradeoff for workloads requiring high-speed local disk I/O or massive parallel thread execution. This configuration is designed for workloads such as small-scale GPU inference, video transcoding, and general-purpose compute tasks that require dedicated CPU cores and moderate GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is an x86_64 virtual machine running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, providing 16 vCPUs alongside 64.0 GB of system memory. The hardware configuration includes a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM to support accelerated workloads. No local storage is bundled with this instance, requiring reliance on network-attached storage options. It operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This server is structured for workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation and moderate GPU acceleration, such as video transcoding, entry-level machine learning inference, and general-purpose compute tasks that benefit from hardware-accelerated processing without the need for high-speed local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c16g1.4xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, designed for GPU-accelerated workloads without local storage.
